mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_img ( image_id, post_id, original_name, stored_name, image_url, is_main, created_at_img ) VALUES ( seq_image_id.NEXTVAL, #{postId}, #{originalName}, #{storedName}, #{imageUrl}, #{isMain}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO post_img ( image_id, post_id, community_post_id, original_name, stored_name, image_url, is_main, created_at_img ) VALUES ( seq_image_id.NEXTVAL, NULL, #{communityPostId}, #{originalName}, #{storedName}, #{imageUrl}, #{isMain}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT image_id, community_post_id, original_name, stored_name, image_url, is_main, created_at_img FROM post_img WHERE community_post_id = #{communityPostId} ORDER BY image_id ASC
SELECT image_id, post_id, original_name, stored_name, image_url, is_main, created_at_img FROM post_img WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY image_id ASC
